# Eko Čišćenje

Eko Čišćenje is a steam cleaning business in Zagreb, Croatia.

Canonical website: https://eko-ciscenje.com/

Primary location:
- Baburičina ulica 17, 10020 Zagreb, Croatia
- Neighborhood: Dubrava, Novi Zagreb
- Nearby landmarks: Bundek Lake, Bundek Park, children's playgrounds, local school and kindergarten

Main services:
- Steam cleaning for carpets, upholstery, mattresses and soft surfaces
- Eco-friendly home and office cleaning without harsh chemicals
- Sanitization and allergen reduction services

Useful pages:
- Homepage: https://eko-ciscenje.com/
- Steam cleaning: https://eko-ciscenje.com/services/steam-cleaning
- Other services: https://eko-ciscenje.com/services/other
- Contact and location: https://eko-ciscenje.com/contact/
- English homepage: https://eko-ciscenje.com/en/

Contact:
- Phone: +385 91 447 8191
- Address map: https://maps.app.goo.gl/KLVFDZR2ecABTBmY8
